summary: CRITICAL: New-BuildMatrix.Tests.ps1 is missing—the workflow references it (line 32) but the file doesn't exist, causing immediate failure. Also missing: fixtures/example-matrix.json. New-BuildMatrix.ps1 lacks Set-StrictMode and $ErrorActionPreference='Stop' (best practice for scripts). Run-ActTests.ps1 is well-structured but orphaned—not called by the workflow, so integration tests don't run through act as required. The workflow will fail on first execution. Core matrix logic is sound, but delivery is incomplete against stated requirements (Pester tests, act-result.txt, all tests through act).
